source.scope: Official-source-backed Malta calendar-year 2026 individual income-tax schedules on caller-confirmed annual chargeable income.

MT.notes: Seven 2026 single, married and parent schedules, including child-adjusted variants, on caller-confirmed annual chargeable income. Eligibility and special regimes remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 ordinary individual income tax under seven caller-selected filing schedules.
